turns.source_text: I'm kind of struggling tonight. Bored, lonely... man
turns.user_message: I'm kind of struggling tonight, can't seem to wind down. I just lie there staring at the ceiling.
I haven't slept more than a few hours in days and my mind won't stop racing at night. I dread going to bed now.
I'm running on almost no sleep and it's starting to affect everything. I can't focus at work and I feel like I'm falling apart.
